query: Which Texas cities have the most active franchise tax permit holders?

steps.rationale: Group by city and count active franchise tax permits to identify the cities with the most permit holders.
Cite the dataset used to provide transparency and attribution for the data.

answer: Houston has the most active franchise tax permit holders in Texas, with 378,629 permits. Austin follows with 291,144, and Dallas ranks third with 232,863. Other cities with high counts include San Antonio (131,739) and Fort Worth (78,186).
